nasb.text: For he who does wrong will receive the consequences of the wrong which he has done, and that without partiality.

esv.text: For the wrongdoer will be paid back for the wrong he has done, and there is no partiality.

cnv.text: 但那些不義的人，必按他所行的不義受報應。主並不偏待人。

ccb.text: 凡作恶的人终必自食恶果，因为上帝不偏待人。

csbs.text: 要知道，那行不义的，将要照着他所行的不义来领受回报；主是不偏待人的。
